hero.eyebrow: For offline merchants · live in 5 minutes
hero.title_line1: Stop paying for ads that bring back
hero.title_line2: people who already buy from you.
hero.sub: KiX brings new customers in with little games on their phone. You only pay when one walks through your door.
hero.assurance: Card-on-file at signup · never charged on Free · cancel 1-click
hero.bignum_label: ad spend, same number of new customers
hero.bignum_proof: Brew Lab $9 → $5.80 CPA · Heng Heng Kopi $7.20 → $4.90 CPA
personas.eyebrow: Built for every kind of merchant
personas.title: Pick the version of KiX that fits your shop.
personas.sub: One product, four flavors. Same dashboard. Same games. Different proof, different price tier, different onboarding.
values.title: Three things you'll feel in week 1.
values.sub: Not numbers. Feelings. Your shop. Your customers. Your bottom line.
values.card1.title: More walk-ins this week
values.card1.body: A spin game lights up at the stall next door. Someone plays. They win a free coffee at your place. They come in this afternoon. That's it.
values.card2.title: They come back next week
values.card2.body: A second game runs only for first-time customers (you decide). 28% come back within 2 weeks. You watch this in a dashboard, not a spreadsheet.
values.card3.title: Less wasted ad spend
values.card3.body: Stop boosting IG posts to people who already eat at your shop. Pay only when a verified NEW customer walks through your door. Most merchants cut their IG/FB spend 35-50% in month 1.
final_cta.sub: 5 minutes to your first live game. Card on file (never charged on Free). Cancel 1-click. No phone calls from sales unless you ask.
